Package org.consensusj.daemon.micronaut

@NullMarked package org.consensusj.daemon.micronaut
bitcoinj SPV Wallet Daemon implemented with Micronaut.
  • Class
    Description
    Application
     
    BitcoinDaemonConfig
    Configuration record for the daemon.
    BitcoinFactory
    Initialize bitcoinj components, etc.
    BitcoinRestController
    Embryonic implementation of Bitcoin Core REST API.
    JsonRpcController
    Create a REST endpoint from a JsonRpcService Here we're using Micronaut annotations to wrap the JsonRpcService in an HTTP environment and to serialize JSON to and from Java POJOs.
    MicronautJsonRpcShutdownService
    Micronaut implementation of JsonRpcShutdownService.
